title: sideritis arborescens subsp. antiatlantica
intro: Sideritis arborescens subsp. antiatlantica, also known as the Tree Heath or Iberian Rockrose, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the genus Sideritis. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues, digestive problems, and stress-related disorders. The health benefits of Sideritis arborescens subsp. antiatlantica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. In traditional herbal medicine, this plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
